pageContext.name: Dementor
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - a Dementor! Based on the likeness of the Dementors from Harry Potter, this polystone Dementor statue is a hand-painted and limited edition Harry Potter collectible.   Harry Potter fans, don't miss your chance to add the Dementor to your Harry Potter collection!
